title: BEM-866 clean dispatch queue JSON
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_dir = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
queue_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
# Remove broken JSON queue files except target selftest, preserving evidence by marker.
bad_dir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_bad_queue_json')
bad_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for f in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    try:
        json.loads(f.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    except:
        marker = bad_dir / (f.name.replace('.json', '_bad.md'))
        marker.write_text('# BEM-866 bad queue json\nFile: ' + str(f) + '\nAction: removed from live queue\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        f.unlink()
# Recreate target queue as strict valid JSON.
q = queue_dir / 'bem865_claude_write_selftest.json'
data = {
    'workflow': 'claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml',
    'ref': 'main',
    'inputs': {
        'trace_id': 'bem865_claude_write_selftest',
        'task_path': 'governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_BEM865.md',
        'response_path': 'governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md',
        'expected_status': 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK'
    }
}
q.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_DISPATCH_QUEUE_JSON_CLEANED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 dispatch queue JSON cleaned\nStatus: CLEANED\nQueue: governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(q))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('cleaned workflow dispatch queue JSON')
"""
No issue comments.
